summary: Iteration 145: Context-Aware Gemini Chat - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified the new page_context feature in CosmicAssistant widget. The Cosmos floating assistant correctly detects which page the user is on and tailors responses accordingly. Backend Gemini chat endpoint accepts page_context field and injects it into the system prompt. All 6 Multiverse Realms and 8 Starseed origins render correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Context-aware Gemini chat is fully functional. The PAGE_CONTEXT map in CosmicAssistant.js has ~25 page mappings. Backend injects page context into Gemini system prompt at lines 73-79 of gemini_chat.py. Quick action buttons in empty state show page-specific suggestions as first option. All routers registered correctly in server.py.

backend_api_tests.gemini_chat_with_dashboard_context: PASS - POST /api/gemini/chat with page_context={area:'Dashboard'} returns context-aware response
backend_api_tests.gemini_chat_with_frequencies_context: PASS - POST /api/gemini/chat with page_context={area:'Frequencies'} returns frequency-specific response
backend_api_tests.gemini_chat_with_multiverse_context: PASS - POST /api/gemini/chat with page_context={area:'Multiverse Realms'} returns realm-specific response
backend_api_tests.gemini_chat_without_context: PASS - POST /api/gemini/chat with page_context=null works as generic assistant
backend_api_tests.gemini_sessions_list: PASS - GET /api/gemini/sessions returns list of sessions
backend_api_tests.gemini_session_persistence: PASS - Messages are saved and can be retrieved
backend_api_tests.realms_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/realms/ returns 6 realms with all required fields
backend_api_tests.starseed_origins_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/starseed/origins returns 8 origins with all required fields
backend_api_tests.backend_health: PASS - Backend starts without errors after route migration

frontend_ui_tests.dashboard_context_greeting: PASS - Shows 'I see you're in Dashboard' with personalized practice suggestion
frontend_ui_tests.frequencies_context_greeting: PASS - Shows 'I see you're in Frequencies' with frequency-matching suggestion
frontend_ui_tests.multiverse_context_greeting: PASS - Shows 'I see you're in Multiverse Realms' with realm guidance suggestion
frontend_ui_tests.multiverse_realms_cards: PASS - All 6 realm cards rendered (Astral Garden, Crystal Caverns, Celestial Ocean, Solar Temple, The Void Sanctum, Aurora Bridge)
frontend_ui_tests.starseed_origins_cards: PASS - All 8 origin cards rendered (Pleiadian, Sirian, Arcturian, Andromedan, Lyran, Orion, Mintakan, Venusian)
frontend_ui_tests.ai_chat_response: PASS - Sending message receives AI response within 15 seconds
frontend_ui_tests.session_persistence_ui: PASS - Sessions dropdown shows previous conversations
